task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat Administration workspace or settings menu is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Message settings section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Message' settings page is open within the Administration panel.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Show Read Receipts' is in the enabled/true state.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Allow Message Editing' is in the enabled/true state.

task_completion.description: Set 'Block Message Editing After (n) Minutes' to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Block Message Editing After (n) Minutes' contains the number '5'.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Allow Message Deleting' is in the disabled/false state.
A 'Save changes' button is clicked, appears greyed out (indicating saved state), or a success toast notification is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is a genuine browser rendering Rocket.Chat, not a text editor or a mocked interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: No MongoDB shell or database management tools are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration requires: 'Show Read Receipts' = True, 'Allow Message Editing' = True, 'Block Message Editing After (n) Minutes' = 5, and 'Allow Message Deleting' = False.
